home.subtitle: Cloudflare-native multi-site B2B whitelabel CMS. UI foundation: Tailwind, purpose-named light/dark theme, composable components.

users.title: User management
users.subtitle: Manage roles, country and tag scope, and remove users.

list.title: Users
list.description: Every user, their role and scope. You can only act on users below your own tier.

remove.title: Remove user
remove.body: Remove {email}? This permanently deletes the user and all their access. This can’t be undone.

errors.notAllowed: You don't have permission to manage this user.
errors.countryNotAllowed: You can only assign countries within your own scope.
errors.tagNotAllowed: You can only assign tags within your own scope.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

tags.title: Manage tags
tags.subtitle: Curate the org tag vocabulary used to scope Managers and label Sites.

info.title: What tags do
info.body: Tags are organisation labels (company group, TO channel, …) assigned to Sites and to Managers. A Manager reaches a Site only when their country and tag both match.

list.title: Tags
list.description: Add, rename, or delete tags. Deleting a tag removes it from every Site and Manager.
list.label: Tag
list.empty: No tags yet. Add your first one above.

delete.title: Delete tag?
delete.body: Deleting "{label}" removes it from every Site and Manager that uses it. This can't be undone.

errors.labelTaken: A tag with that name already exists.
errors.notAllowed: You don't have permission to manage tags.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: You're the first to sign up, so this account becomes the SuperAdmin.
register.closedBody: An administrator already exists. New users join by invitation.

errors.registrationClosed: Registration is closed — an administrator already exists.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

invites.title: Invite users
invites.subtitle: Invite a teammate by email. They set their own password when they accept.
invites.notAllowedBody: Only SuperAdmins and Admins with invite rights can send invitations.

form.title: New invitation
form.description: Choose the role and country scope for the invited user.
form.countryHintGlobal: Select one or more countries. Leave empty for all countries (global).
form.countryHintScoped: Select one or more of your countries.

sent.deliveredBody: They'll receive an email with a link to accept and set their password.
sent.manualBody: Email isn't configured yet, so share this link with them directly. It expires in 7 days.

pending.title: Pending invitations
pending.description: Invitations that haven't been accepted yet.

email.subject: You've been invited to bizbeecms ProjectManager

accept.title: Accept your invitation
accept.subtitle: Set a password for {email} ({role}) to finish creating your account.

notFound.title: Invitation not found
notFound.body: This invitation link is invalid. Ask your administrator to send a new one.

expired.title: Invitation expired
expired.body: This invitation has expired. Ask your administrator to send a new one.

accepted.title: Already accepted
accepted.body: This invitation has already been used. Try signing in instead.

errors.notFound: This invitation is no longer valid.
errors.accepted: This invitation has already been used.
errors.emailTaken: An account for this email already exists.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

errors.notAllowed: You're not allowed to invite users.
errors.countryNotAllowed: You can't invite users for that country.
errors.emailTaken: An account for this email already exists.
errors.alreadyInvited: This email already has a pending invitation.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

sites.title: Sites
sites.subtitle: Create and manage whitelabel Sites. Each Site deploys as its own CMS.
sites.notAllowedBody: Only SuperAdmins and Admins can create Sites. You can manage Sites you're assigned to.

list.title: All Sites
list.description: Sites you can see based on your role and country scope.
list.emptyAssigned: You haven't been assigned to any Sites yet.
list.name: Name

form.createDescription: Name the Site and choose its country scope.
form.editDescription: Update the Site's name, slug, and country.
form.name: Name
form.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Used in the Site's URL.
form.countryHintGlobal: Pick a country, or leave as Global for all countries.

timeline.title: Deploy timeline
timeline.description: Each deploy step with its start time, duration, and any error.
timeline.empty: No deploy events yet. They appear here once a deploy runs.

assign.title: Assigned users
assign.description: Users who can manage this Site. Country scope limits who's eligible.
assign.label: Users
assign.noneAssignable: No eligible users for this Site's country.

deploy.title: Deployment
deploy.cardDescription: Provision or update this Site's CMS Worker on Cloudflare.
deploy.description: Deploys the CMS as this Site's own Cloudflare Worker.

errors.notAllowed: You're not allowed to deploy this Site.
errors.alreadyDeploying: A deploy is already in progress.
errors.uploadFailed: The Worker upload failed. Please try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.deployerUnreachable: The deploy service is unreachable. Please try again.

deploy.inProgress: Deploy in progress… this can take a couple of minutes.
deploy.stuck: This deploy has been running too long and is likely stuck. You can cancel it or start a new one.

errors.slugInvalid: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.
errors.slugTaken: That slug is already in use.
errors.notAllowed: You're not allowed to do that.
errors.countryNotAllowed: You can't create a Site for that country.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

customDomain.title: Custom domain
customDomain.cardDescription: Point a customer's own domain at this Site.
customDomain.description: Register a domain the customer controls. They add the DNS records shown below at their registrar; Cloudflare issues the HTTPS certificate automatically.
customDomain.label: Customer domain
customDomain.hint: A domain the customer controls, e.g. example.com or www.example.com
customDomain.notDeployed: Deploy this Site first — a custom domain needs a live Worker to point at.

errors.notAllowed: You're not allowed to manage this Site.
errors.notDeployed: Deploy this Site before adding a custom domain.
errors.badRequest: That doesn't look like a valid domain.
errors.notConfigured: Custom-domain support isn't configured on the deployer.
errors.deployerUnreachable: The deploy service is unreachable. Please try again.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

customDomain.apexUseA: Apex domain (no subdomain) — can't use a CNAME, so use these A records:
customDomain.txtAdd: Add this TXT record (one is enough; add all if your provider allows):
customDomain.certIssued: No validation record needed — the certificate is issued.

guide.heading: Setting up a custom domain
guide.intro: The customer adds a DNS record at their registrar that points their domain at us. Pick the path that matches the domain they want to use.
guide.cnameBody: For a subdomain such as www, add a CNAME pointing it at our router:
guide.apexRedirect: An apex (bare) domain can't be a CNAME, so redirect the apex (e.g. example.com → www.example.com) with a 301 at the registrar or a Cloudflare redirect rule.
guide.apexBody: To serve the bare apex directly (no redirect), add both A records to Cloudflare's anycast IPs:
guide.moreFlatten: Apex CNAME / CNAME flattening (ALIAS/ANAME): registrars like Cloudflare Registrar or Namecheap let the apex CNAME to cf.bizbeecms.com directly — use it instead of A records when available.
guide.moreAAAA: AAAA records: optional IPv6 addresses alongside the A records; Cloudflare's anycast already answers over IPv6, so they are not required.
guide.moreDcv: Certificate validation (DCV): after the domain is added we show a one-time TXT record to prove control. Providers that support DCV delegation can instead delegate via a _acme-challenge CNAME so renewals are automatic.
guide.certNote: Once the record resolves to us, Cloudflare issues and renews the HTTPS certificate automatically.

designSystem.title: Design system
designSystem.intro: The building blocks of the ProjectManager. Every component is shown across its sizes, states, and configurations. Toggle the theme above to audit each one in light and dark — all colors resolve from purpose-named tokens.

foundations.title: Foundations
foundations.description: The purpose-named token palette. Components reference these by role (bg-primary, text-foreground), never by raw color.
foundations.accentStatusHint: The indigo accent is used sparingly. Status colors always travel with an icon or label.
foundations.typeScaleHint: One sans across weights; mono for machine data.

type.headline: Headline
type.body: Body — the default reading size for descriptions and helper copy.
type.label: Label / caption

buttons.title: Buttons
buttons.description: Four variants, three sizes. Active nudges down; focus shows a ring; loading blocks interaction and keeps its width.
buttons.statesHint: Hover & focus are interactive — try the keyboard.

inputs.title: Inputs
inputs.description: Composed structurally with Field + Label + Hint/Error. Controls share one focus treatment.
inputs.roleHint: Scopes what this user can do.
inputs.inviteEmailHint: They'll receive an invite to join this Site.

combobox.title: Combobox
combobox.description: A custom, controlled, accessible select: searchable, single or multiple, min/max selected, custom item UI, custom search predicate, and a configurable selected-items preview.
combobox.singleSearchableHint: Default {id,label} options, or a custom item type via accessors.
combobox.countrySearchHint: Searchable, custom item type via accessors (label = name).
combobox.minMaxHint: min 1 · max 3 — try removing all, or adding a 4th.
combobox.customHint: Custom search predicate (try “bal” or “ee”) + custom item UI.

badges.title: Status badges
badges.description: Tone + glyph + label. Status meaning never relies on color alone, so a color-blind operator reads it correctly.
badges.rolesHint: Plain counts and tags use the neutral tone with no dot.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.description: Inline feedback. Tinted surface, leading icon, title + body. Flat — a 1px border, no shadow.
alerts.deployQueuedBody: The Worker build for helsinki started a moment ago. This usually takes under a minute.
alerts.warningBody: Replace the placeholder database id in wrangler.jsonc before the next production deploy.
alerts.failedBody: The Cloudflare API returned 403. Re-authenticate and retry.

card.title: Card
card.description: A flat container: 1px border on a raised surface. Header / content / footer compose as needed.
card.inviteDescription: They'll get an email to join this Site.
card.siteBody: Last deployed 4 minutes ago · 2 site managers.

table.title: Table
table.description: Composable table primitives. Rows hover; status reads through a badge, not row color.
